reviews.review_title: What happened to the full game
reviews.review_description: I am extremely disappointed but this is not a full game by now so many people that I know would have bought this game we have been waiting so long for biblical games and we're still waiting hoping that you continue to develop this game and bring it to the forefront that we may all have a great experience I believe it was out for a short period of time for 25 dollars or a little more I went to go and buy it off of my wish list and it was gone now all we have is the demo which is extremely short only keeps you wanting more it's 2025 please keep it alive and bring it to the forefront we may all have the great experience of being in the story of David and Goliath I believe you can do this developers you have done a great job with the demo anything I ask is for smooth turning the rest of the game seems perfect as far as the demo gone please bring it back out so we may purchase this and please develop more biblical Bible stories so we may purchase that also look forward to seeing more of your work hopefully you'll consider this long request and make it happen for all those who love these type of games and love the Lord thank God
I was about to buy it but it's gone.

As a Sunday School teacher I am excited for this content! Not only historically accurate but it is also much fun. I can hardly wait to have the full game. How can we help? I will certainly spread the news.

DvG is a super active game, pumping your hands up and down to move through the levels is freeing (kinda like Creed) and the sling is harder, but super gratifying and you feel like a boss when you smash those targets and enemies.

reviews.review_title: Enjoyable story and fun game play .
reviews.review_description:
First, thank you developers for this great VR demo game.  Love to play the full game.
It is educational and fun to play.  The art work are beautiful,  Please continue to add more gameplay and contents to it.  I will buy this fun game.

I was not expecting very much because it's dealing with the Bible and normally video games and Bible do not equal quality and fun. I am so impressed with the quality and how well the game is made. I hope the developer not only complete the game but also make games based on Bibles stories
This game is absolutely amazing!!!  We were so disappointed it's only a demo.   We can't wait for the rest of the game!   Please make it available!
i like stroy  and the gameply 😀😀

reviews.review_title: Great but hears why it was for me
reviews.review_description: In the bible u play as david david was weak blah so you use a slingshot weird control but if u are a Christian get it its awesome

reviews.review_title: Fell through floor and had to restart...
reviews.review_description: When the sheep roll towards you, I dodged one and immediately fell through the floor...deleted the game when I saw it started me at the very beginning and I had to watch everything again.

Not my kind of game. And the other review is right, this is a story about a boy killing a giant by cutting off his head. Not really for younger ones, I agree on that. But the overall game itself isnt my thing. It's hard to control, the aiming is annoying, and the overall outcome is not my style. Graphics are nice tho :) 

And when I say it's not my thing doesent mean it's yours. This might become your faverouite game of all time unless you think of this review wrong. It's just my opinion. Have a nice day.
great game, and great beginning . where is the full game?¿?¿??? I want more then a demo.
Wish there was more...its a great game!

Looks good wish there was a way to be the Goliath it would make the game better or 
add some time slow spells pretty good game.

reviews.review_title: A pleasant surprise worth 2 thumbs up!
reviews.review_description: I've been playing VR games for a few years now and really enjoyed this demo!  A beautiful open-world environment, boss battle style play, family-friendly, and what looks to be tons of additional challenge levels have me excited for the full game release.  The slingshot option is fun but the challenge and satisfaction of mastering the old school sling are totally worth it.  The sling mechanics are incredible!  It's also a blast playing with a group... had some friends and family over and we took turns playing and watching everyone's reactions.  I'm definitely on board for the full game release!
Pretty good little demo,is there a date set for Oculus 2 release?
